records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank goodness I arrived right on time. It would've been a disaster if I was even a little late.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He went back... to reality.

records.m_Talk_FRA: He went back... to reality.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I developed... a virus.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With this... I will destroy. Counters Legacy's system.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With this... I will destroy. Counters Legacy's system.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With this... I will destroy. Counters Legacy's system.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what?! Don't you think that's too simple of a solution?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what?! Don't you think that's too simple of a solution?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what?! Don't you think that's too simple of a solution?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we destroy the system that has merged with Overlord itself, the Counterside Effect will stop.

records.m_Talk_FRA: If we destroy the system that has merged with Overlord itself, the Counterside Effect will stop.

records.m_Talk_FRA: The destruction of the system may cause some aftereffects to players who didn't log out beforehand, but there is no other way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is no going back... if we delay it.

records.m_Talk_FRA: There is no going back... if we delay it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because we hope for Counters to continue... until the distant future.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Because we hope for Counters to continue... until the distant future.
